titleStmt.title: SII 26.167: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 167. (A.R. No. 157-A of 1909.) SAṄGRĀMANALLŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

p.hi: Kōṉēriṉmaikoṇḍāṉ: Vīranārāyaṇa (?): No date: c. 1139-49 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records the grant made by the king, to the servants of the deity of the temple of Vīrachōḻīśvaramuḍaiyār, of paddy from a village in Oṉpadukarai-nāḍu to provide for the food-offerings to god Sundaraperumāḷ Vināyakappiḷḷaiyār and for the images of the god Tirubhuvanasundarar and to the temple of the goddess Nāchchiyār which were set up for the merit of the king's māmaḍi (uncle) and for taking out in procession (of the images of the above deities) on the day in the month of Puraṭṭāśi when the asterism Sadaya, the star of nativity of the king, occurs.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koneriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Āḷuṭaiyār viracoḷiccaramuṭaiyār koyilil devakanmikaḷukku nam Olai kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu Oṉpatukarai nāṭṭu tava māṭakkoyil pūvaḻi Oṉṟukku civapbraāmaṇar Uvaccar nima
ntakkāṟar cuntarapperumāḷukku Amutupaṭi nāḷ 1- kku I kalamun tānappeṟu I nāṟkalamuṅkūṭik koyiloṉṟukku pūvaḻi cuntaraperumāḷamutupaṭi Uḷpaṭa nellu mukkalamum vināyakappiḷḷaiyār koyil kku nel Oru kalamum māmaṭikku naṉṟāka nām Eḻuntaruḷuvitta tirupuvana cuntaraṟkum nācciyāṟkum nāḷoṉṟu canti muṉṟu Arici patakkirunāḻikkum Ammainācciyāṟku nāḷo
nṟukku Arici Irunāḻikkum namakku naṉṟāka nam janmanakṣatram piraṭṭāti cataiyattile tirunāḷeḻuntaruḷat tiṟtapprasādam tantu Aruḷit tirunāḷukkum cuntarapperumāḷamutupaṭi koyilār kalamum niṅkalāka tānappeṟu koṇṭu Amutupaṭi Arici patakku nānāḻiyum tirunāḷum celvataāka Iṉnel Oṉpatukaraināṭṭuk kāppār �vvārkaḷe taṇṭi Innāṭṭu karaikkāṇikku 2 10 1 mā viṭṭe
ṉ Ittuviccantira peruntirukkaṭṭileri paṇṭārakkālāle Aḷantu kuṭuppārākavum Ikkāla kūrā ceyvarākavum polivu poṟpū kkakūṟai koḷḷātomāka nam Ōlai kuṭuttom nantamāraṉārppeṭuttuk kuṭukka Ivai viranārāyaṇa viraciṅkatevaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 26.167 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
